questions.statement: There are 40 cars in a row. White car is 13th from left end. What is its position from right end?

10 years ago, a father&rsquo;s age was <span class="math-tex">\(3\frac{1}{2}\)</span>&nbsp;times that of his son, and 10 years from now, the father&rsquo;s age will be <span class="math-tex">\(2\frac{1}{4}\)</span>&nbsp;times that of the son. What will be the sum of the ages of the father and the son at present?

<p>In the following question, select the missing number from the given series.</p>

<p>35, 4, 41, 0, 43, ?</p>
If letters of the English alphabet are written in reverse order then which letter is 5<sup>th</sup> to the right of 12<sup>th</sup> letter from the right?

<p>Select the option that is related to the third word in the same way as the second word is related to the first word.</p>

<p>Canada :&nbsp;Ottawa ::&nbsp;Italy :&nbsp;?</p>

<p>In the following question, from the given alternative words, select the word which cannot be formed using the letters of the given word.</p>
PROGNOSTICATION
In a certain code language, 3224 means &lsquo;Taj is in Agra&rsquo;, and 4245 means &lsquo;Agra is near Delhi&rsquo;. Which of the following is the code for &lsquo;I like all fruits&rsquo;?
